entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - SAP AI Services

entry.title: Re: Addition to Existing Stock for a batch Managed produc...
entry.content:
Hi,

The fixed bin we will not use at this WH - but we have made a improvement request for having the possibility to add to Existing Stock for a batch Managed product ; https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/321020 .

Best Regards Elin

entry.title: Return to Supplier in SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hope this blog can address most return / reversal goods movement scenarios in Procurement. Different movement type representing the following 3 reversal scenarios respectfully and we will also talk about the advanced return management.

Return Delivery

Cancellation of material document

Basic Return to Supplier

Advanced Returns Management

Return Delivery

Movement type 122 with the reason for return movement specified referencing original material document.

After posting the return delivery, we can see the material document with movement type 122 (Return delivery to vendor).

Cancellation of material document

Movement type 102 representing the reversal of original material document movement type 101.

Re-order 10 PCs of material 94 and cancel the material document, here is the history review. Movement type 102 (Goods receipt for purchase order into warehouse - reversal) is shown as below.

Basic Return to Supplier

Material document with movement type 161 (Returns for purchase order)

To create a return purchase order with the order type Standard PO (NB), we need to manually set the Returns Item indicator at item level to create a return item. Return items can coexist with other order items in the same purchase order.

Step 1: Standard purchase order creation with the ‘Return’ field ticked.

Step 2: APP ‘Post Goods Receipt for Purchasing Document’ to post goods receipt on the return item.

Material document with movement type 161 (Returns for purchase order) was created as per the PO history.

Step 3: APP Create Supplier Invoice to create a Credit Memo

After posting, let’s check the accounting document.

Advanced Returns Management

Material document with movement type 161.

An advanced return purchase order should leverage the order type as Enh.Ret.to Supplier (NB2). The Returns Item indicator at item level is set automatically and cannot be removed. In this scenario, return items cannot coexist with other order items in the same purchase order. The use of a delivery is mandatory.

Step 1: Create a return order with APP ‘Create Purchase Order -Advanced.’

We will find the Return tab appear in the item details

Step 2: Transfer the quantity to be returned to the dedicated storage location (optional)

APP ‘Transfer Stock - In-Plant’

In this case, we suppose storage location 131C as the physical location to deal with return items.


Step 3: Create an outbound delivery for the return order

APP ‘My Purchase Orders - Due for Delivery (VL10B)’

We can see the outbound delivery 80000103 has been created from PO history.
Step 4: Pick and post the goods issue
APP Manage Outbound Deliveries (F0867A)

 

After Picking and Posting Goods Issue, the PO history was updated with movement type 161.
Step 5: Create a credit memo

APP Create Supplier Invoice (F0859)

We can see the GR/IR account was positive instead.

Step 6: Order a replacement material (Optional)

APP: Receive Replacement Materials - From Vendor

To activate this function, step 5 should be eliminated so that you can type the replacement quantity in this APP.

Let’s check the return PO overview first.

Then type in the replacement quantity, 10 PC here and click save. Replacement Purchase order 4500000435 has been created.

Step 7: Post Goods Receipt (Optional)

APP Change Inbound Delivery (VL32N)              

Input the put away quantity, post goods receipt.

Step 8: Follow-Up Activities For Replacement Material (Optional)

APP: My Follow-Up Activities - For Replacement Materials (MSR_VRM_LFU)

In the ‘Logistical Follow-Up’ session, enter Follow-Up Activity: <0011 Transfer to Free Available Stock >

In the replacement purchase order history, we can see GR IR has been automatically created.

Go to the original purchase order, Return tab on the header, open the return overview:

You can see the full historical view of the return PO

More to explore:

SAP S4HANA Cloud Public Edition Logistics FAQ - SAP Community

The features covered in this article are based on SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition 2402, please refer to the latest information for changes in subsequent versions.

Hope you LIKE it if it addresses your issue. After that, please feel free to comment after following my account and I will reply ASAP.

entry.title: PO Approval Workflow deadline count
entry.content:
Toa all

Today , when the approver not approve the PO within 5 days the workflow move to 1st backup.
But I don't know if it's 5 working days ,open day or based on factory calendar.

=> I would like to know how the dealine shall be counted in approval workflow, if we need to consider factory calendor here. Also if holidays are counted to count deadline?

Regards

entry.title: MB51 Report Fields in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

The MB51 report in the public cloud is missing important fields like Receiving Storage Location, G/L Account, Receiving Batch, and Receiving Material etc. These fields are essential for the client's requirements.

Is there a way to get to these fields from the MB51 report on the public cloud?

thanks / Suresh.E

entry.title: How to load .rpt files created for Windows application to web based application using javascript sdk
entry.content:
How to load .rpt files created for Windows application to web based application using javascript sdk.

We have C# code to load rpt files into report viewer in windows.We need same functionality into Web based application .

We are using React/Javascript/Nodejs .Is there a crystal report viewer for javascript platform.

Could you provide javascript samples to load/view rpt files into crystal report viewer

SAP Crystal Reports viewer SAP Crystal Reports - SDK

entry.title: Re: Days Before Archiving SFC/SO is not working
entry.content:
Hi!

 

The settings of system rules are cached, and sometimes the cache does not get updated after manual changes in the Systm Rule Maintenance. In such cases, you should trigger a cache update manually in any way:

- system or app restart;

- SAP Note 3032569;

- SAP Note 2794151;

- by means of NotifyCacheUpdated method of NotificationService WSDL (named as NotificationProcessingIn in Single Service Administration of NWA), using "SystemRuleBOCache" as CacheName parameter.

entry.title: Re: Hello!
entry.content:
Great to have you here in SAP Community @ThomasTuagan - are there particular SAP topics that you wish to learn about? I'd like to share some useful links with you below:

  • Beginner Corner
  • Blog posts (read what other community members have to say)
  • Discussion groups (discuss, connect, share)
  • SAP Managed Tags (subscribe to your topic areas of interest)

entry.title: Re: Linking into several variants from diagrams in Signav...
entry.content:
Hi @julienmoigno,

thank you - your suggestions make sense to me. We found another solution yesterday which may also seem feasible (and was not available until the last deployment last week): When we link to the template process from within our process structure we are now able to add the "Variant Management" Panel to the Diagram Page and access the variants from there.

What I noticed though was, that the variants are not inheriting the hierarchy of their respective template: If the template process was on level 2, the respective variants will be on level 0 unless they are not explicitly linked to other processes. Is this the intended behaviour?

BR, Anna

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Where did XVBPA get populated in program MV45AFZZ

maybe the dependency analyzer might help you.

Please see here the relevant help content.

Does this help you?

Kind regards,

Wolfgang

entry.title: Re: Milestone Billing - SAP SD
entry.content:
Hi Brinda,

First and foremost, WBS is solely for the purpose of planning the cost & revenue for the particular project which would be expense planning, staffing and timesheet etc. and hence you cannot maintain any billing milestones here in the workpackage.

The reason why you see WBS/NETWORK when you click on Milestone in Billing tab is "WBS element is directly associated to Billing milestones which helps in the revenue recognition calculation".

The best approach would that creating the billing milestone on the project level itself which saves your time of creating Sales Order separately. I would assume that you are creating a project in "Create Customer Projects" application and maintain the workpackage to plan your costs and revenues and later when you arrive to the "Billing" tab; select Contract type, Product, Description, Assign the workpackage (created earlier in previous step) and enter the amount to be billed. Now go inside this billing item and maintain your milestones after this when you return back to main screen and click on save a Sales Order would be automatically created.

Hope this helps.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Currency Conversion: Different Booking Date for different Account Elements
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I am using a New Model with an Account Dimension, one Measure and one calculated Measure. In the Account Dimension, I am using two key figures, for one of them I have to use the booking date as the reference, for the other one I am using Booking date + 1 month.

It is possible to realize this with 2 converted measures, one for each key figure. But this leads to problems in the table in the story, if I want to show both key figures in one table.

I want to display it like this:

 Converted Measure
Key figure 112
Key figure 210

But currently, it looks like this:

 Converted Measure 1Converted Measure 2
Key figure 11213
Key figure 2910

So my question is whether it is possible to make adjustments to a single Account Element? Or is there a different workaround?

Thanks you!

Kind regards,
Eric

entry.title: ACDOCA
entry.content: Can ACDOCA be used by ABAP'ER for creating custom report?

entry.title: Feature Request: Show which processes are using a certain variant dimension within the dictionary

Hi,

we are actively exploring the variant management within SAP Signavio Process Manager and have noticed, that the dictionary entries, which are used as a dimension for a process variant, do not have the link back to the process it is used in. I believe that this would be a valuable information.

BR, Anna

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Key User Extensibility: Custom field with context-dependent value help
entry.content:
Hi @georg_wilhelm,

We are currently adding some custom fields related Bank Account Management (business context Bank Account Master Data - I_BankAccountTp).

I have added the custom field as code list as well as using available standard CDS view as value help and it published successfully.

Only issue over here is that in my earlier version of 2022, in the backend extension include the newly value help CDS created for code list was displayed as check table as well as value table but now in 2023 version it is displayed only as value table and not check table due to which user is able to enter values which are not part of code list values or CDS data values.

Could you please help what I am missing here or is there any note available to resolve this ?

Regards,

Kashish

entry.title: Re: Hybrid Scenario: Usage of SAP HANA Calculation View on SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,
I agree to Tuncay. Although there might be exceptional scenarios where it makes sense to user SAP Datasphere content in the classic onPrem environments (another example is consumption of Datasphere Views in BW via a SDA remote connection, see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/bestpractice-how-to-use-sap-datasphere-as-source-for-sap-bw-4hana/ba-p/13561972 ), the strategic general approach should be to move towards SAP Datasphere and its data acquisition and modeling concepts. This is the future-proof skillset required.

KR Frank

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 4 - Mobile device capabilities

entry.title: Re: Pricing Determination in SAP S/4HANA On-Premise System
entry.content:
Hello Padmakar,

As of now there is no alternative(until and unless the whole Pricing Procedure/Function becomes some API based mechanism) for the requirement which you have stated other than going for Pricing Routine. Am really not able to understand why we need to deviate from this existing well established setup in Core with something else.

Regarding 'Clean core way' please understand it would not always be possible to stick with this. And moreover you need to understand that it mainly relies on using as much as Standard APIs possible and also moving out the requirements like having a Custom Table outside the Core ERP and have the same in BTP layer ( again if the scope for the same is there) . Pricing is something internally which happens inside S4 Core and already SAP has provided a Well defined Provision for the same, so why to deviate from the same. Likewise there would still be instances where are bound to implement BADIs and other Enhancements for getting Business specific requirements done.

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Monthly Webinar - May 2024
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite is an integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables the design, development, execution, governance, curation, analysis, and management of the full lifecycle of integration flows, APIs, and high-volume business events that connect on-premises and cloud-based processes, services, applications, and data across organizations. SAP Integration Suite is available on multiple cloud providers.

In this webinar, we'll have two sections:

Product Updates: Get updates on key capabilities and latest enhancements released for SAP Integration Suite.


OR

#AskAnythingIntegration: Our panel of experts will answer any questions you have on integration.

entry.title: Re: Smart Edit blank page on 2211
entry.content:
Hi,
I think you must set the following property to get it to work in the cloud.

smartedit.tomcat.hostname=localhost

Kind regards, Stephan

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere error, how to enhance authorization in S4HC Communication User?

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps: Task 3
entry.content: e53d86abbfadc7d899ea5d4c06fd2a5ddf2519ef0e25297f53c4d75510a7e67c

entry.title: Re: Exploring GraphQL and REST for SAP Developers
entry.content:
I agree that OData Service is offering indeed many advantages but it's also worth considering the role of GraphQL in SAP development. from my perspective and for specific scenarios, GraphQL can offer more flexibility and efficiency in fetching data, especially in scenarios where clients require specific data sets tailored to their needs. For example, consider a scenario where a Fiori application needs to retrieve information about customers and their orders from an SAP backend. OData may require multiple requests for data, which can cause over or under-fetching. GraphQL streamlines data retrieval with a single query, reducing unnecessary data transfer.

query {
  customer(id: "123") {
    id
    name
    email
    orders {
      id
      date
      totalAmount
      status
    }
  }
}

In this example, the GraphQL query explicitly requests customer details (id, name, email) and their orders (id, date, totalAmount, status) in a single request. This reduces network overhead and improves the efficiency of data retrieval, especially in scenarios where only specific subsets of data are required.

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps - THANKS!
entry.content: and @Rekha_DR ... thanks @Vaibhav_Sapra for your comment 😺

entry.title: Preliminary What’s New Information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.3
entry.content:
Preliminary versions of What’s New information and of the Product Assistance are now available for customers and partners to get a preview on the upcoming new and changed features of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2402.3.

You can find this preview on the current Help Portal page SAP S/4HANA Cloud (see What’s New section “Preview of SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402.3”). To access the Preliminary What’s New information, please use the What’s New Viewer or the Release Assessment and Scope Dependency (RASD) tool.

The RASD tool provides you with a personalized and tailored view on What’s New information based on the activated and used scope within your system. The preliminary information for SAP S/4HANA Cloud 2402.3 will be available in RASD within the next few days. We recommend using RASD to prepare for upgrades and updates of your system and to focus on the new and changed features that are relevant for you.

A valid S-User ID is needed to use the RASD tool and to view all the preliminary content stated above.

entry.title: CDS-Views in Datasphere not visible

I am trying to integrate CDS-View IFIGLACCTLIR in Datasphere as a remote table, but cannot find it under Extractors > ABAP_CDS, I can only find the generated table to the view in ABAP Tables. Why can I not see the CDS-View itself? Thanks in advance.

Sergio

entry.title: Auto Flow - scheduled feature
entry.content:
In the Version 1 there was an option to set the workflows as 'scheduled' in order to implement something like:

"Send an email to the quote owner 5 days before the Valid To date is reached"

In the Verison 2 currently within the Auto Flow there is no option for scheduled flows. When is this planned?

entry.title: Journal entries not listed on incoming payment created by DI API
entry.content:
Dear all,

We have a custom SAP Business one addon that creates draft incoming payments in SAP via DI API.

When the user changes the date through SAP in order to load the documents journal entries are not displayed.

I can see that the value for showJDT = 'N'. How can i set the value to Y during the creation of the incoming payment.

Please note that the setting under the document settings is checked.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Retire the SE16 in Production server
entry.content:
There is issue with Tx. SE16. Our management want to disable the use of Tx SE16 in Production environment.

We already restricted through authorization but remove the possibilities for accidental assignment . Please share the possibilities how should we proceed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Retire the SE16 in Production server
entry.content:
Especially in a standard setup, where roles are maintained in the DEV system and then transported to QAS and PRD, it can happen, that roles, which contain the authorization to access SE16 could be transported to PRD by accident.

 

Therefore an additional way to avoid the access to se16 has to be used.

The easiest way is to lock the application in the PRD system.

There are 2 ways of an application lock:

  1. a global lock - to be set with transaction SM01_DEV
  2. a local lock - to be set with transaction SM01_CUS

For this scenario, where SE16 should be locked in PRD only, the local lock is applicable. It can be set directly in PRD, as it is a customizing setting and can be used directly as it is a 'current setting'.

SAP note #2234192 provides more information, as well as the documentation available within the SM01_*-t-codes. The former SM01 is not available anymore.

 

b.rgds, Bernhard

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Magdeburg am 27.05.2024 bei der regiocom SE Magdeburg
entry.content:
🔄Nächster Halt: SAP Stammtisch Magdeburg

Dieses Mal mit dem Schwerpunkt "Energiewirtschaft" und direkt bei der regiocom SE 🏭

Erleben Sie ein exklusives "regiocom Special" vor den Fachvorträgen – Details folgen!

🕢Einlass zu den Vorträgen ab 18:30 Uhr, Start um 19:00 Uhr (hybrid)

💡 Vortrag 1: Testdaten für die SAP MaCo Cloud in der verteilten Energiewirtschaf

📈Vortrag 2: Entwicklung des Marktstammdatenregisters der Bundesnetzagentur durch Regiocom

Für Speis und Trank ist bestens gesorgt. Wir freuen uns auf einen spannenden Austausch – sowohl vor Ort als auch digital!

Für die vor Ort Gäste bitten wir um eine Zusage im Event oder per Mail an magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org 

Wir freuen uns auf Sie!

__________

🔄Next stop: SAPStammtischMD

This time with a focus on the "energy industry" and directly at regiocom SE 🏭

Experience an exclusive "regiocom Special" before the presentations - details to follow!

🕢Admission to the presentations from 6:30 pm, start at 7:00 pm (hybrid)

💡1: Test data for the SAP MaCo Cloud in the distributed energy industry

📈2: Development of the Federal Network Agency's market master data register by Regiocom

Food and drink will be provided. We look forward to an exciting exchange - both on site and digitally!

For on-site guests, please register at the event or send an email to magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org 

We look forward to seeing you!

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Magdeburg bei der regiocom SE
entry.content:
Melden Sie sich für den kommenden SAP Stammtisch Magdeburg zum Thema "Energiewirtschaft" bei der regiocom SE an!

Start für das vor Ort regiocom Special ist ca. 17:30 Uhr und für Vorträge wie gewohnt 19 Uhr.

Alle Infos finden Sie in unserer SAP Community Gruppe.

Für vor Ort Teilnahmen bitten wir um Zusage im Event oder per Mail an magdeburg@sapstammtisch.org

entry.title: Custom Partner Function is deleted after saving
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Asking for your expertise on a problem I encountered. In VA01, when I save the sales document, the custom partner function is deleted. When looking in MV45AFZZ, I can't seem to find where this deletion of partner function is happening. 

I already tried debugging in USER_SAVE_DOCUMENT_PREPARE and USER_SAVE_DOCUMENT but no deletion happened. Wanted to know if you have any idea how to approach this type of problem.

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba

SAP Ariba Category Management can also leverage Joule during Sourcing project creation. Kindly refer this video for more details.

SAP Ariba Category Management and Joule AI demo

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Key User Extensibility: Custom field with context-dependent value help
entry.content: Hi Kashish, whether the code values of a key user custom field of type code list are checked or not does not depend on the fact which value help you choose. It depends on how SAP application development enabled their custom fields support in their respective application...some applications call a validation API and some do not. So if you want us to follow up please create a ticket so that we can have a look in the system. Best regards Georg

entry.title: Re: SAP Customizing Tables (SM30); Allow Wildcard (*) Fie...
entry.content:
There's no screen check of the entered value if you unselect "Check required":

The value help will still be available.

entry.title: Re: How to create the cds entity Vector column in CAP?
entry.content:
I've installed following dependencies, 

"@cap-js/hana": "^0.2.0",
"@Sap/cds": "^7.8.2",
"@Sap/cds-compiler": "^4.9.0",

it's working now 

Thanks all of your comments...

entry.title: advanced formula step for calculation of dynamic measures
entry.content:
I need to write advanced formula step for calculation of dynamic measures. We take useful life as counter input for FOR loop, then we do a calculation. But while writing back it should create columns(calculated measure) dynamically based on the counter.

FOREACH [d/Asset]
@Life = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="UsefulLife")
FOR @counter = 1 TO @Life
DATA([d/Measures] = "Depreciation",[d/Asset]=[d/Asset]) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="TotalCost")/RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures]="UsefulLife")
ENDFOR
ENDFOR

I get the following output.

But I need the following output for the column based on useful life.

entry.title: Re: How to create the cds entity Vector column in CAP?
entry.content: i've installed all following dependencies, and working now..

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba

entry.title: Types of Images that can uploaded into SAP Graphics (SE78)
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone please confirm what are the types of Images that can be uploaded into SAP Graphics (SE78) ?

Because, I am not able to upload any other image than .BMP file. Is there any other process to upload an Image in SAP Graphics ?

 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Assertion failed: Unable to generate a new password for database login 'sa'.
entry.content:
im also having the same issue . installing the latest mini sap on a virtual box with OpenSuse Leap.

can you guys help? thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP Customizing Tables (SM30); Allow Wildcard (*) Fie...
entry.content: This is a good point, thank you. But It want the system to check the foreign Key's (error Message) with the Exception of (*). The User must  inpu either an existing Value of the check Table or (*).

entry.title: ABAP - how to trace from header texts back to sales orders
entry.content:
Hi,

I know that from sales orders, I can use FM read_text to read the header and item texts.

I have a scenario that for example, I need to find sales orders based on header text contents.

Is it possible to do that?

Regards,

Tri

entry.title: REST API Call for downloading file
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on SAP PO 7.5 to download the file from AWS S3 bucket. so i have followed the blogs

(https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-download-a-file-from-amazon-s3-buckets/ba-p/13419722)

 

on the same and have used "GET" call instead of PUT and interface is OK and getting response 200 in the monitoring. But i dont know if the file is really getting downloaded anywhere or not coz i dont see the trace or logs for the same.

Could you please let me know how and where to check for the downloaded file.

 

thanks

entry.title: Invoice issue for 3rd party without shipping notification
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

We are facing a major issue as part of Sales Processing using Third-Party without Shipping Notification (BDK) where system is copying the item quantity from Vendor invoice without any subsequent checks which is resulting in Invoices generated for a different quantity from Sales Order.

For example, we have a sales order where item 10 has quantity as 50. Order is saved, a purchase requisition was automatically created. Then the Purchase order generated with reference to requisition. 

The issue: Accidentally, we processed the Vendor invoice incorrectly with quantity as 50,000 instead of 50 by mistake. As soon as this was created, the Billing date on Sales order was updated and an Order related billing document was generated with 50,000 quantities. Now a customer invoice was incorrectly processed for 50,000 quantities, and the amount was automatically calculated as per the pricing condition records maintained in the system, rather than the price populated on the Vendor invoice.

Question: When creating the customer invoice in the Create Billing Documents app, shouldn't be there a safety checks or tolerance limit in these cases? Now SAP is automatically populating the quantity from Vendor invoice without any checks.

Please can you investigate the reason this has happened?

Thanks and regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Invoice issue for 3rd party without shipping notifica...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

From MM side there is no tolerance limit check for sales order quantity. For your information, the tolerance limit configuration for supplier invoice is Configuration (SSCUI) 101947. You can see there is no tolerance check for PO or service order quantity, so it does not take sales order quantity or purchase order quantity into consideration. 

Unfortunately there is no check on SD side for such cases as well. System using the information given by predecessor document. If there are 50 items delivered, from billing side the system will have to care about that there are 50 items invoiced. If the quantity changes (even drastically like in this case) system can not determine if this was by accident or on purpose. 

Best regards,

SAP Expert

entry.title: Dropdowns should not overlap the filter panel.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am writing to seek assistance regarding an issue I have encountered with the SAP Analytics Designer template. Specifically, in the template, there is a filter panel that appears upon clicking the filter icon. However, a dropdown is presented beside the filter icon, it overlaps with the filter panel. This presents a usability challenge, and I am seeking guidance on how to ensure that upon selecting the dropdown, the filter panel either closes automatically or remains hidden to prevent overlap.

Thanks!

Thanks

entry.title: An error could come up execution due to currency difference between the source and target version
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am now facing the error in currency difference issue even though I set up in currency conversion table. This following error is generate in Line number 15 and 17 when I validate the script in Data Action of "Copy Actual to Plan Data". Additionally, I traced those lines and data cannot be generated for both Plan and Actual. Please kindly provide an advice and I would like to know which configuration steps are still left to develop.

Model: SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan

Data Action : SAP_FI_FPA_IM_S4FinancialPlan_Admin2 

Plan tracing ran but Data not showed.

Actual tracing couldn't be run.

 

 

Thanks in advance.

Phoo

entry.title: Need clarity on SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Malaysia Solution
entry.content:
Hi,

We need clarity on the SAP Document and Reporting Compliance Malaysia(mandatory electronic invoicing) Solution.

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Need clarity on SAP Document and Reporting Compliance...
entry.content:
Hello,

MY Electronic Invoicing DRC solution is currently under evaluation. As of now, you can go through SAP Blog Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia - SAP Community, specially the How to prepare for e-invoicing? section. Also continue following Regulatory Change Manager (Planned Delivery Date May 31, 2024) for any further updates and to get the latest status.

entry.title: Validation during Create - Similar to Side effects
entry.content:
Hello Experts.

Is there a way we can invoke Side Effects like instant validation on key fields which are to be filled during press of CREATE button?

For example I can perform a check on field in Precheck event but it gets invoked only when I press continue and in the form of validation message.

My requirement is to instantly display validation state message for particular field once the invalid value is entered, just as we get state error of field in draft mode using side effects.

I tried using side effects but it does not get invoked here, I suppose, because they are used for Draft enabled app and invoked in Transactional buffer, at this point during Create the transactional buffer is not yet reached.   Also I see standard behaviour of field format validation automatically works based on field type. 

Required something like this (This is standard behaviour)

entry.title: Re: A Guide to Calling RFC Function Modules from SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hi,

thanks for your good blog. I have an little issue with the language (jco.client.lang): how can this value be changed dynamically in the IFlow itself? We use same BAPI's that return messages and I'd like to set the consumer language as "input parameter", so message are returned in the "correct" language. Do you see a chance to pass the language from the IFlow to the ERP system? (The BAPI's don't have an input parameter for the locale.)

 

Thanks.

Regards

Karsten

entry.title: Re: Universal ID Problem with Linked Accounts
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi, Yes I followed same steps "click on the "Linked" tab first, then go back to the "Not linked" tab, still I do not see "Link" option.

entry.title: Re: ABAP - how to trace from header texts back to sales o...
entry.content:
Hi Tri,

you might be able to do this via table STXH which has the generic fiield TDNAME containing the key(s) of the object, the text refers to. Standard sales order header texts have TDOBJECT = VBBK and you may also need to restrict it via TDID and SPRAS depending on your requirements.

You'll have to make sure that TDNAME is in this case only the VBELN as some of the object keys in field TDNAME are concatenations of different fields, so that you could for example have MANDT+VKORG+VBELN and you'd then have to pick the correct places from TDNAME to get only the VBELN.

Hope this helps!

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: FI/CO interface: Balance in transaction currency
entry.content:
FI/CO interface: Balance in transaction currency

Message No. RW022

How to solve this error

Aswanth

I am trying to find out what is the total amount of memory available on my Sap Analytics Cloud tenant in MB or GB, and the currently used storage  for all the objects, models and stories.

In the System Overview tab I cannot find this information.

Do you have any suggestion?

Many thanks,

Best Regards.

Filomena

entry.title: GST Report for multiple business places in one run.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I want to generate a GST statutory report in the S/4HANA CLOUD, PUBLIC EDITION enviorment from the "Run Statutory Reports" fiori app. I have configured the business place as per client need wherein multiple business places have the same GSTIN.

 

Now I want to generate the GST report for multiple business places  but i am unable as SAP is showing the following error :- 

and then i click on RUN

 

So if wanted a report for both the business places how can i do that / is it possible?

If possible do guide me in doing so.

 

Thanks 

Bhavesh

entry.title: Re: April (Citizen) Developer Challenge – SAP Build Apps - THANKS!
entry.content: Will you be providing a working version of the two projects, so that people can understand how to use all the cool features that we used?

entry.title: Re: Branding and Theming for Mobile Applications
entry.content: @Virinchy MDK currently doesn't support themes from SAP UI theme designer. We have a backlog to address this MDK's future releases. If there is a requirement for your MDK solution, please submit a feature request, and we'll review its priority.

entry.title: Re: Message no. M8083:Price too high (tolerance limit of...
entry.content: Tolerance limit is set in T.code - OMR6 for Tolerance Key PP, either same can be set to new limit, or we can allow certain user to post the entries with Tolerance limit exceeded by assigning the particular user in T.code - OMRM with warning message to post the entries with MIRO T.code.

entry.title: Re: ABAP CDS Hierarchy Definition - Not able to Preview
entry.content: Data Preview for Hierarchy works for me in S/4HANA 2023 FPS01. Perhaps some auth issue in the underlying view?

entry.title: Re: Updating contract Payment terms
entry.content:
Hi.
Explaining.
I have the document number that cames from EKKO / EKPO table (ebeln).
What do you suggest to update the contract info (in this case the Terms of Payment)?
Thanks in advance.
Marco

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account and getting started in the community
entry.content:
Hi David,

My name is Oanh, I'm from Vietnam and I interest in participating in the digital skills initiative for my career. 

I looking forward to participating in the digital skills initiative. Thank you for your consideration.

entry.title: SAP Enterprise Support Academy Newsletter May 2024
entry.content:
Dear customers,
Find here an overview of the SAP Enterprise Support Academy monthly newsletter on latest news, training courses, upcoming sessions, and further educational offerings.
The SAP Enterprise Support Academy provides expert guidance and high impact knowledge transfer services that enable you to innovate and be successful with your SAP solutions.

Subscribe to regularly receive latest news and stay informed about the wide range of educational offerings provided by the SAP Enterprise Support Academy that help you to build the digital skills tailored to your needs.

Preview available live sessions on SAP Support Portal, tailored per region:
APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North America*

Please note: A one-time registration for SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support [accessible here] is necessary to register for these events.

Resources to Achieve a Clean Core

Want to benefit from the latest innovations from SAP with minimal effort? Our new clean core page within SAP Enterprise Support value maps highlights specific offerings designed to support your clean core strategy across the main elements of an ERP system.

How we support clean core

Pilot: SAP Datasphere Fundamentals

Coming in May, tentatively the week of May 13th, we will pilot a new Expert-guided Implementation (EGI) on SAP Datasphere Fundamentals. These enablement sessions we will help you understand key concepts and see quicker time to value when adopting SAP Datasphere.

Register your interest: SAP Datasphere Fundamentals

SAP Business AI in Human Resources

Explore our new SAP Business AI in Human Resources page within the SAP SuccessFactors HCM Value Maps Learning Room. Learn how AI is used in SAP SuccessFactors solutions to create a dynamic, inclusive, and future-ready workforce in HR.

Click here to access (value maps access required)

Innovate With the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council

Join the SAP Enterprise Support Advisory Council (ESAC) program with our new and open workstreams for Q2. Benefit from collaboration, innovation, and gain early access to new tools and resources. With that, take the opportunity to influence and shape the SAP Enterprise Support content portfolio.

Further details

Transition From SAP Solution Manager to SAP Cloud ALM

SAP Solution Manager is in mainstream maintenance until the end of 2027. Need help with switching to SAP Cloud ALM? Check out our E-learnings in the SAP Enterprise Support value map for Application Lifecycle Management and SAP Cloud ALM.

Learn more 

Make the most of RISE with SAP and GROW with SAP using SAP Enterprise Support Value Maps

RISE with SAP and GROW with SAP are strategic packages for companies looking for a cloud ERP solution that can be implemented quickly, securely, and cost-effectively. SAP Enterprise Support value maps offer focused support for these packages and provide organized information for your implementation or upgrade, ensuring timely access to the right resources.

Watch the video to discover which value maps can benefit you

Live Sessions SAP Signavio Business Process Transformation

Join the upcoming knowledge transfer session within value maps for SAP Signavio Business Process Transformation. Find related self-paced learnings and expert-led live sessions that are available through the value maps. Ask questions and get guidance on how our Foundational Support offering can help you achieve your project goals.

Save May 15 and register here

Find the previous session replays here:
Session 1: Overview, SAP BTP and Analytics
Session 2: SAP S/4HANA and Supply Chain Management Solutions
Session 3: SAP solutions for HXM, CX & Spend Management

SAP Analytics Cloud: Continuous Quality Checks

Get to know the portfolio of continuous quality check services for SAP Analytics Cloud, available to you from SAP Enterprise Support. Leverage our support now and start your project with confidence.

Click here for the full article: SAP Analytics Cloud: Continuous Quality Checks

How to Prepare for a Transition to SAP Sales and Service Cloud Version 2

The evolution of SAP Sales and Service Cloud has been nothing short of revolutionary, and it's time to transition to the latest Version 2. But how do you make this shift smoothly and efficiently?

Check out this blog to learn how to do it. Also the Sales Cloud V2 and Service Cloud V2 Learning Journey are a good guidance. Contact the value map team if you have questions.

A Robust Security Package for the SAP Customer Data Cloud (CIAM)

In today’s fast-paced digital sphere, managing customer identities and data has become a significant task for businesses. The SAP Customer Data Cloud (CIAM)–Security Package securely regulates user access and provides a secure environment for customer data.

Check further detail here, go to the CDC Value map Leaning Journey or contact the value map team if you have questions.

SAP for Me - How to Manage Your Support Cases

Improved features have been released for case management in SAP for Me, including case quick view, favorite cases, column-based sorting, and auto confirm cases reminder. Easier to navigate and interact with us through the redesigned user interface for case edit and list.

Learn more

Unlocking Proactive Solutions: Preventative Content now Live in SAP for Me

The new ‘Preventative KBAs & Notes’ card is now live in SAP for Me. Preventative Knowledge Base Articles (KBAs) are solutions that are identified by Artificial Intelligence services. This helps you to minimize disruptions, react immediately, and anticipate and mitigate potential risks for your software solution landscape.

Check out the SAP Community blog post: sap.to/61106ZZKtY

  • Guidance on signing up
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy Video
  • SAP Enterprise Support Academy at a glance
  • Direct access to SAP Learning Hub (Login with your s-user ID and password)
  • SAP ES Academy Entitlement document
  • FAQ
  • SAP Enterprise Support value maps
  • SAP Support Portal
  • Basics: Sign up | Time zone setup |
  • Formats: EGI | MTE | AIE | Program
  • Search: Language | Keyword | Filter | Calendar
  • Upcoming live sessions in your region: APJ | EMEA | Latin America | North Americ

entry.title: Gradient/Rainbow Colour in SAP Build App
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a gradient colour for a container background?

Thanks, Isyraf

entry.title: Re: HU and product task for outbound
entry.content: Hello Jürgen, Since radio data transmission is used, an HU must be specified in the warehouse task. In addition, layout-orientated storage control is used. B

entry.title: Re: ABAP - how to trace from header texts back to sales o...
entry.content:
Seems you require some search-help on long text content to find the objects that carry this text?

  • By default, you cannot, the long text values are stored in a clustered type table.
  • So look for SAP tools such as Enabling Searching in Long Texts

entry.title: Re: Onboarding 2.0 New Hire directed to SSO screen
entry.content:
Hi,

I think they need to save the link from welcome mail BEFORE they click enter as the link then changes. In the link from the Welcome mail looks like this; https://performancemanager5.successfactors.eu/login?company=xxxxxxxx&username=privatemail&pm_product_name=ONB but if you click enter it looks like this; https://adfs.xxxxxxxxxx/adfs/ls/wia?SAMLRequest=fZJdxxxxxxxxxxxxx800100008b (ananomized) which looks up Active Directory.

So I would encourage them to either use link form mail every time or save the link BEFORE they click enter.

Rgs Mads

entry.title: how to show description order in print out
entry.content:
hi expert,

in iw32 there are description order, how to show description order in print out, this case is configuration or modification program? 

thank u

#plant maintennce #order #iw32

entry.title: SAP Enable Now Help Topic Pane Colour
entry.content: Hi all, from the development side, would it be possible to change the background colour of the Enable Now pane (grey) to other colours?
